languages.text: {n}Вы сдвигаете в сторону тяжелый остов и роетесь в клубках проводов и пересохших трубок. Смахнув с тела истлевшие обрывки ткани, вы находите блок памяти, изъеденный ржавчиной.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вы сдвигаете в сторону тяжелый остов и роетесь в клубках проводов и пересохших трубок. Смахнув с тела истлевшие обрывки ткани, вы находите блок памяти, изъеденный ржавчиной.{/n}

languages.text: {n}You move the heavy frame aside and rummage through the tangled wires and dried tubes. As you brush decayed scraps of cloth off the body, they reveal a rusted memory module.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы сдвигаете в сторону тяжелый остов и роетесь в клубках проводов и пересохших трубок. Смахнув с тела истлевшие обрывки ткани, вы находите блок памяти, изъеденный ржавчиной.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You move the heavy frame aside and rummage through the tangled wires and dried tubes. As you throw decayed scraps of cloth off the body, they reveal a rusted memory module.{/n}
{n}You move the heavy frame aside and rummage through the tangled wires and dried tubes. As you throw decayed scraps of cloth off the body, they reveal a rusted memory module.{/n}
{n}You move the heavy frame aside and rummage through the tangled wires and dried tubes. As you brush decayed scraps of cloth off the body, they reveal a rusted memory module.{/n}
{n}You move the heavy frame aside and rummage through the tangled wires and dried tubes. As you brush decayed scraps of cloth off the body, they reveal a rusted memory module.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你将沉重的躯壳挪开，在缠成一团的线缆和干枯导管间翻找。当你拂去尸体上腐烂的布片时，一个锈迹斑斑的记忆模块露了出来。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You move the heavy frame aside and rummage through the tangled wires and dried tubes. As you brush decayed scraps of cloth off the body, they reveal a rusted memory module.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你将沉重的躯壳挪开，在缠成一团的线缆和干枯导管间翻找。当你拂去尸体上腐烂的布片时，一个锈迹斑斑的记忆模块露了出来。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Apartas el armazón pesado a un lado y rebuscas entre los cables enredados y los tubos secos. Mientras apartas trozos de tela raída del cadáver, encuentras entre ellos un módulo de memoria oxidado.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You move the heavy frame aside and rummage through the tangled wires and dried tubes. As you brush decayed scraps of cloth off the body, they reveal a rusted memory module.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Apartas el armazón pesado a un lado y rebuscas entre los cables enredados y los tubos secos. Mientras apartas trozos de tela raída del cadáver, encuentras entre ellos un módulo de memoria oxidado.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous déplacez la structure imposante et fouillez parmi les câbles entremêlés et tubes asséchés. À mesure que vous ôtez les lambeaux de tissu du corps, vous révélez un module de mémoire rouillé.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You move the heavy frame aside and rummage through the tangled wires and dried tubes. As you brush decayed scraps of cloth off the body, they reveal a rusted memory module.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous déplacez la structure imposante et fouillez parmi les câbles entremêlés et tubes asséchés. À mesure que vous ôtez les lambeaux de tissu du corps, vous révélez un module de mémoire rouillé.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ağır iskeleti kenara itip birbirine dolanmış teller ve kurumuş tüpler arasında geziniyorsun. Çürümüş kumaş parçalarını cesedin üzerinden temizlediğinde paslanmış bir hafıza modülü ortaya çıkıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You move the heavy frame aside and rummage through the tangled wires and dried tubes. As you brush decayed scraps of cloth off the body, they reveal a rusted memory module.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ağır iskeleti kenara itip birbirine dolanmış teller ve kurumuş tüpler arasında geziniyorsun. Çürümüş kumaş parçalarını cesedin üzerinden temizlediğinde paslanmış bir hafıza modülü ortaya çıkıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du schiebst den schweren Rahmen zur Seite und wühlst dich durch die verknoteten Drähte und trockenen Röhren. Als du einige verweste Fetzen Stoff zur Seite streichst, förderst du ein rostiges Speichermodul zutage.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You move the heavy frame aside and rummage through the tangled wires and dried tubes. As you brush decayed scraps of cloth off the body, they reveal a rusted memory module.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du schiebst den schweren Rahmen zur Seite und wühlst dich durch die verknoteten Drähte und trockenen Röhren. Als du einige verweste Fetzen Stoff zur Seite streichst, förderst du ein rostiges Speichermodul zutage.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたは重い枠を脇へ動かし、もつれた配線と乾いた管をかき分ける。朽ちた布の切れ端を亡骸から払いのけると、その下から錆びたメモリーモジュールが現れる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You move the heavy frame aside and rummage through the tangled wires and dried tubes. As you brush decayed scraps of cloth off the body, they reveal a rusted memory module.{/n}
